title: Hundreds Of Illegal Brick Kilns Burn Openly In Jajpur As Heatwave Soars - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
While Jajpur district is already boiling under a severe natural heatwave, man-made fires are making life completely unlivable for local residents! In Jajpur’s Bari block, hundreds of illegal brick kilns are operating in broad daylight, openly defying government orders.
Local residents are grappling with a dual crisis of a scorching sun and thick, toxic smoke. Despite strict directives banning the operation of traditional clay brick-burning units due to severe environmental and health concerns, operators continue to run these setups right under the nose of the local administration. The intense heat generated from these illegal kilns, combined with soaring summer temperatures, has turned Jajpur's Bari region into a virtual furnace. Locals allege administrative collusion as repeated complaints continue to be ignored while air pollution levels hit dangerous limits. Watch this detailed report exposing the network of illegal brick kilns choking Jajpur
